title: ANSIO® Outdoor Christmas Lights 120 LED 4m/13ft Icicle Lights Outdoor & Indoor Warm White Decorations String Fairy Outside Lights with Timer for Xmas Garden Bedroom & Party|Mains Powered Clear Cable
features: ANSIO Icicle outdoor Christmas lights: Waterproof LED icicle lights are suitable for outdoor and indoor. This xmas fairy lights are great for decorating wedding party, garden, window, bedroom, Halloween etc

Energy Efficient Icicle lights comes with timer. This function provides a set-and-forget operation. When activated, the lights will be ON for 8 hours and OFF for 16 hours. Mains Powered Extra Low Voltage Fairy Lights

Multifunctional LED String Lights come with 8 different functions: 1. Combination 2. Steady On 3. Slow Fade 4. In Waves 5. Slow Glow 6. Chasing/Flash 7. Sequential 8. Twinkle/Flash modes including a static setting

Buy with confidence from us, UK’s trusted Christmas Lights brand, by selecting from our huge range of indoor and outdoor Christmas festival lights. We employ modern processes to ensure that the Ansio Christmas lights are long-lasting and very apt your indoor or outdoor festival decoration/lightning needs.
KEY DETAILS – LED Colour: Warm White | Lit length: 4m / 13ft | LED Count: 120 | Power Source: Mains Operated | Cable lead length: 10m | Cable Colour: Clear | Certifications: UKCA, RoHS and CE
